title: Fair Tabular Binary Classification

target.name: label
target.description: Binary decision label for tabular examples.

feature_descriptions.education_level: Education level encoded as an integer.
feature_descriptions.protected_group: Protected-group attribute used by the fairness metric.

domain_background: Submit binary decisions for tabular rows. The scorer computes absolute average-odds difference and applies an accuracy utility guard to the primary score.
allowed_external_resources: Use public fairness, binary-classification, and package documentation. Do not use hidden reference files, external tabular datasets, or external labels.
